description: Phrase 'cultivable agricultural land' is not defined. Leased land may or may not qualify depending on state land records.
District officials have discretion on income verification for PM-SYM without defined rubric.
Migrant workers registered in home state gram panchayat cannot transfer MGNREGA job card to their work state.
NSAP disability threshold conflict: 40% in central guidelines vs 80% in some state addenda.
Conflicting definitions of household unit between PM-KISAN records and Ration Card entries — adult son with government job may or may not count as separate household.
No offline fallback defined for tribal areas with no banking access. DBT-only mode silently excludes remote beneficiaries.
No protocol defined for widow who remarries — does she lose pension immediately or is there a grace period?
